jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - PGIMER - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
